# IntelFlow

> IntelFlow is an India-first news briefing product operated by Swarnim Capital.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://intelflow.in/
- Daily briefings: https://intelflow.in/daily
- RSS feed: https://intelflow.in/feed.xml
- Disclosure: https://intelflow.in/disclosure
- Privacy: https://intelflow.in/privacy
- Terms: https://intelflow.in/terms

IntelFlow organises links and short automated, extractive briefs from attributed third-party publishers. It is not original reporting, investment advice, legal advice or medical advice. Important claims should be verified with the linked publisher.
